As featured in Brides Daily News Bridal Guide TODAY Fearless Award

Not soft. Not staged.

Your wedding is the most cinematic night of your life. It should be photographed like one.

Dark, high-energy, off-camera-lit, and story-first: images with the drama and intimacy of a film still, not a posed gallery. Real moments, boldly seen, from a photographer who has spent a decade learning where to stand.

The photographer

I'm Hendrick, and I chase the real over the perfect.

For over a decade I've photographed weddings across New York City and the Hudson Valley, from Le Chateau and Park Chateau to Grandview and beyond.

My work is dark, cinematic, and story-first. I light with intent, I move quietly, and I'm looking for the moment most people miss, the honest, in-between, unrepeatable ones. It's earned a few Fearless awards along the way, but what I care about is that your photos feel like the night actually felt.

Bring me your loud family, your first look, your last dance. I'll be the one in the right place at the right second.

Hendrick Moy

Start your inquiry →

Where I shoot

At New York's best rooms, and well beyond them.

A decade of weddings across the city, the Hudson Valley, New Jersey, and the Northeast, at prestige venues and hidden gems alike.

01Le ChateauSouth Salem, NY
02Park ChateauEast Brunswick, NJ
03GrandviewPoughkeepsie, NY
04New York CityManhattan · Brooklyn · Queens
05The Hudson Valley& the greater Northeast

What happens next

Simple, from hello to gallery.

i.

Reach out

Send your date and venue. I'll confirm availability and share collections and pricing.

ii.

Let's talk

We meet, in person or on a call, so you know exactly who's showing up on your day.

iii.

The day

I arrive early, read the room, and shoot it like a film, no stiff posing, no missed moments.

iv.

Your gallery

You receive a cinematic, cleanly-delivered gallery to relive and share for a lifetime.

The investment

Bespoke coverage for a once-only night.

Every wedding is different, so every collection is built to fit. Tell me your date and venue and I'll send full collections, what's included, and starting investment, right away.

Let's begin

Tell me about your night.

Send your date and venue and I'll come back personally with availability, collections, and pricing. Dates book well ahead, so earlier is better.
